userStories.title: Add pluginMode config to ReviewConfig schema
userStories.description: Add a new optional field `pluginMode` to the ReviewConfig type and schema in `src/config/`. Valid values: "per-story" (default, current behavior) and "deferred" (skip plugin reviewers per-story, run once at end of run). Update the config schema validation (Zod) to accept and default this field. Update `src/review/types.ts` ReviewConfig type if it mirrors the config schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Zod schema in config validates pluginMode with default "per-story"
Existing configs without pluginMode continue to work (backward compatible)
Unit tests verify schema accepts both values and defaults correctly

routing.reasoning: Single optional config field addition with straightforward Zod schema validation and backward-compatible default; no new behavior or logic.

userStories.title: Skip plugin reviewers in review stage when pluginMode is deferred
userStories.description: Modify the review stage (`src/pipeline/stages/review.ts`) and review orchestrator (`src/review/orchestrator.ts`) to skip plugin reviewer execution when `config.review.pluginMode === "deferred"`. Built-in checks (typecheck, lint, test) must still run per-story regardless of pluginMode. When skipped, log a debug message indicating plugin reviews are deferred. The `ReviewOrchestrator.review()` method should accept the pluginMode and conditionally skip the plugin reviewer loop.
acceptanceCriteria: When pluginMode is "deferred", plugin reviewers are NOT executed in the per-story review stage
Built-in review checks (typecheck, lint, format) still run per-story regardless of pluginMode
Debug log emitted when plugin reviewers are skipped due to deferred mode
When pluginMode is "per-story" or undefined, behavior is identical to current (no regression)
Unit tests for review stage cover both per-story and deferred paths

routing.reasoning: Conditional logic across 2 files (review stage + orchestrator) with tests for multiple paths; straightforward implementation but requires understanding existing flow and ensuring no regression

userStories.title: Run deferred plugin review after all stories complete in runner
userStories.description: After all stories have been executed in the sequential executor flow, if `config.review.pluginMode === "deferred"` and plugin reviewers are registered, run plugin reviewers once against the full diff from the run start git ref to HEAD. Capture the run-start git ref at the beginning of execution (before any stories run). Use the existing `getChangedFiles()` from `src/review/orchestrator.ts` with the run-start ref as baseRef. Log results and emit appropriate events. If any plugin reviewer fails, log a warning with findings but do NOT fail the run (the run already succeeded per-story). Store the deferred review result in the run summary/metrics so reporters can include it.
acceptanceCriteria: Run-start git ref is captured before first story executes
After all stories complete, plugin reviewers run once with full diff (run-start ref to HEAD)
Deferred review only runs when pluginMode is "deferred" AND plugin reviewers are registered
Plugin reviewer failures in deferred mode log warnings but do NOT fail the overall run
Deferred review results are available in run summary for reporters
Integration test verifies deferred review runs once at end with correct diff range
When no plugin reviewers are registered, deferred review is silently skipped
